name: Sophos XG Firewall - Inbound Attack Detected by IDP
description: An inbound attack detected by the Sophos XG Firewall's Intrusion Detection and Prevention (IDP) policy. This indicates a potential threat from an external source, such as an exploit attempt, port scan, or denial of service attack.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the firewall: an inbound attack has been detected by the IDP policy. The attack originated from the source IP address **{source_address}** and was targeting the destination IP address **{destination_address}**. The attack was detected from the country **{country}**. This is a strong indicator of an external threat attempting to compromise a system on the network. Immediate investigation is required to block the malicious source and to secure the affected system.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the attack.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the attack.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: The country of origin for the attack.
